title: tecoma stans var. mollis
intro: Tecoma stans var. mollis, also known as Yellow Bells or Mexican Gold, is a flowering plant species in the trumpet vine family, native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Tecoma stans var. mollis include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory function, and supporting the immune system, as well as providing antioxidant and antibacterial effects. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
